Title: Thanks, Linkup

Author: Announcements
Title: Linkup Update
Content: The Linkup Website Is Now Avalible, However Limited Functionality Is Avalible. To Get Full Functionality Download The PC Application. The PC Application Is Still Functioning Normally So Your Account Is Still Accessible Via The PC Application. You Can Also Delete Your Account At https://dvr-properties-ghe.github.io/LinkUp/AccountOptions
